description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition with an inactive supplier business partner. Submit for approval. Check if PRQ is auto-rejected and email is sent to requester.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition is auto-rejected and requester receives email notification about inactive supplier

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with inactive supplier business partner
Check if PRQ is auto-rejected and email is sent to requester
steps.expected_result: PRQ is auto-rejected and requester receives email notification about inactive supplier

test_cases.summary: Regression: PRQ Approval Flow with Active Supplier

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition with active supplier business partner. Submit for approval. Complete Buyer Review. Purchase requisition is now in approved status. Run Buyer Work Queue and accept Purchase Requisition. Purchase Requisition is now in converted status. Open Purchase Order from Linked Requisition Line Data. Submit PO for approval. Complete DOA and Supplier Response. PO is approved.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition is approved and converted to a purchase order successfully

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with active supplier business partner
Purchase requisition is now in approved status
Run Buyer Work Queue and accept Purchase Requisition
Purchase Requisition is now in converted status
Open Purchase Order from Linked Requisition Line Data. Submit PO for approval
Complete DOA and Supplier Response. PO is approved.
